ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-14-2015 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-30-2015 Continued To Dec-14-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.
Shortly prior to the hearing, Walter MacDonald, Counsel for the Petitioner, telephoned the Court and said that his family's flight out of Chicago last night had been delayed and he had not returned to his home in San Jose until 4:00 am, and that his alarm had not gone off, so he was unable to attend the hearing today. He stated that there had been a problem with electronic filing of his documents, which would be corrected today, and requested a continuance of the hearing.
The matter was continued to December 14, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.
Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-19-2015 Continued To Nov-30-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nathaniel Bigger specially appearing for Walter MacDonald for (petitioner) Adrian DaSilva.

Mr. Bigger stated that all of the funds were received on October 3, 2015 and that a continuance is requested. The status of filing a petition for final distribution was continued to November 30, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Bigger provided the court with a proposed order extending administration.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Oct-29-2014 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Sep-17-2014 Continued To Oct-29-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Walter MacDonald for Adrian DaSilva (Executor).

Mr. MacDonald stated that there is one more distribution coming to the Estate from Mary Colter MacDonald's Trust, that there is an escrow waiting to close, that they are praying that it will be closed by September 25th, that there have been objections and that there are 27 Parties involved. Mr. MacDonald also stated that as soon as the money is in the account, he will send recommended distribution. The status report was continued to October 29, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court extended administration of the Estate until April 7, 2015. The Court advised Counsel that he needs a petition for approval of report on status of administration and notice with the required language, that he needs to pay the $60.00 filing fee and that he needs to submit a proposed order.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jul-23-2014 Continued To Sep-03-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The court noted that an order to appear was issued to Mr. MacDonald regarding his request for additional time to administer the estate, for failure to file a proof of service of the notice of hearing on the status report, which he has not done. The order to appear also includes the language on Probate Code section 12201. The current order to appear is being discharged and a new order to appear will be issued for September 3, 2014. If the proof of service is not filed by that date and Mr. MacDonald does not appear, sanctions will begin to run at $25.00 per day. The status report is continued to September 3, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in department 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jun-25-2014 Continued To Jul-23-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney to appear on July 23, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he has not given proper notice of the status report and why he failed to appear. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Wu. (Not Reported)
